halfLife - Variable in class com.softsynth.jsyn.circuits.NoiseModSwoop

halfLife - Variable in class com.softsynth.jsyn.ExponentialLag
Controls rate at which to approach input.
halfLife - Variable in class com.softsynth.jsyn.PeakFollower
Controls rate at which to approach input.
handleChunk(ParseIFF, int, int) - Method in interface com.softsynth.jsyn.ChunkHandler
The parser will call this when it encounters a chunk that is not a FORM or LIST.
handleChunk(ParseIFF, int, int) - Method in class com.softsynth.jsyn.SynthSampleAIFF
Called by parse() method to handle chunks in an AIFF specific manner.
handleChunk(ParseIFF, int, int) - Method in class com.softsynth.jsyn.SynthSampleWAV
Called by parse() method to handle chunks in a WAV specific manner.
handleEvent(Event) - Method in class com.softsynth.jsyn.AppletFrame
 
handleForm(ParseIFF, int, int, int) - Method in interface com.softsynth.jsyn.ChunkHandler
The parser will call this when it encounters a FORM or LIST chunk that contains other chunks.
handleForm(ParseIFF, int, int, int) - Method in class com.softsynth.jsyn.SynthSampleAIFF
Called by parse() method to handle FORM chunks in an AIFF specific manner.
handleForm(ParseIFF, int, int, int) - Method in class com.softsynth.jsyn.SynthSampleWAV
 
HarmonicTable - Class in com.softsynth.jsyn.util
A table containing harmonics of a fundamental sine wave.

hashName(String) - Static method in class com.softsynth.jsyn.Synth
Convert a String to a hash value that is used internally in CSyn for fast name lookup.
hideControls() - Method in class com.softsynth.jsyn.view102.InternalSynthScope
Hide controls for zooming, panning, etc.
highlight(int) - Method in class com.softsynth.jsyn.view102.CheckboxPanel
Highlight an indexed checkbox.
highlight(int) - Method in class com.softsynth.jsyn.view102.InternalBarGraphEditor
Unhighlight previous value, highlight new one.

Set coefficients of filter for High Pass operation.

highPass - Variable in class com.softsynth.jsyn.StateVariableFilter
